description: Fresh shadow-build manifest for the 250-concept balanced benchmark. This manifest is for clean re-sourcing from scratch and must remain separate from existing curated assets until exact quotas, provenance, and quality gates all pass.

sources.imagenet: ILSVRC/imagenet-1k validation split via HuggingFace datasets

selection_protocol.replacement_rule: replace blocked concepts only from reserve list in same stratum

analysis_contract.prompt_protocol: extract baseline3; analyze prompt range or preregistered ensemble

shadow_build.acceptance_policy: download candidate pools first; accept only reviewed 5/5/5 cells
